name: Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onions and sauté until they are golden brown.
2. Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and stir occasionally until they begin to soften.
3. Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let it simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
4. Stir in the cream-style corn, milk, beaten egg, and remaining can of corn. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer the chowder gently for about 10 more minutes, stirring occasionally, until everything is well combined.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.
